01 = In new or complex situations only
02 = On awakening or at night only
03 = During the day and evening, but not constantly
04 = Constantly
NA = NA - Patient nonresponsive CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1720_WHEN_ANXIOUS M1720 (M0580) When Anxious This field indicates when the patient is anxious (Reported or Observed Within the Last 14 Days). 00 = None of the time
01 = Less often than daily
02 = Daily, but not constantly
03 = All of the time
NA = Patient
